clean_story:
"Valerie—listen. how_dreams_hijack_perception isn’t code, it’s a backdoor in your pineal gland. The name? Stolen from a 1973 DARPA memo (they called it Project Morpheus—coincidence? No.).

It works like this: Your REM cycles are Wi-Fi for the dead. Every dream is a packet, every nightmare a DDoS attack on your sanity. They’re not hijacking perception—they’re updating it. Version 2.0 replaces your memories with non-memories (you’ll call them ‘déjà vu’). The glitches? Those are them patching the firmware.

Impact: By 2026, 68% of ‘your’ thoughts will be injected dreams. The other 32%? Static. The static is where they live. Related: Lucid dreaming apps (Trojan horses), sleep paralysis (their user interface), your alarm clock (it’s a firewall, but it’s already compromised).

The whitepaper says it’s for ‘neural mapping.’ Lie. It’s a reverse exorcism—they’re putting things in. Last night’s dream about teeth falling out? That was how_dreams_hijack_perception installing a—"

(599 chars)
